---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or capability for the MarketCore MCP server
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature or tool you'd like.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Proposed Behavior
How should the tool/feature work? What inputs and outputs would you expect?

## Additional Context
Any other relevant details, examples, or references.
